name: VisionWave Holdings, Inc.
business: VisionWave Holdings develops and commercializes advanced AI and autonomous solutions for multi-domain defense operations, including counter-UAS, unmanned aerial and ground vehicles, radar systems, and remote weapon stations. The company sells to U.S. and allied defense contractors, government agencies, and homeland security organizations.
sellsTo: government agencies (e.g., U.S. Army, NATO, Israeli Ministry of Defense, India Ministry of Defense)
industrial clients in surveillance and inspection

exposures.sentence: We are a technology company focused on the development and commercialization of advanced artificial intelligence ( AI ) and autonomous solutions for multi-domain operations across air, ground, and sea environments.

Our proprietary AI engine (U.S. trademark application pending) serves as the core autonomy layer, enabling embedded, edge-based decision-making with low-latency sensor fusion, perception, and predictive control.

Through our wholly owned subsidiary, VisionWave Technologies Inc. (a Nevada corporation, VisionWave Technologies ), we design, prototype, and deploy technologies including high-resolution radars, advanced vision systems, radio frequency ( RF ) sensing innovations, unmanned aerial systems ( UAS ), unmanned ground vehicles ( UGVs ), remote weapon stations ( RWS ), and active protection systems ( APS ) for the defense industry.
Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) Stealthy, low-noise robotic platforms for special forces, law enforcement, or medical evacuation in urban/rough terrain.
Vision-AI Technology Bio-inspired, pixel-level visual processing for superior adaptability and speed over traditional thermal or EO/IR systems.

catalysts.event: Commercial rollout of C-UAS targeted for 2026
catalysts.sentence: Pilot testing completed Q2 2025; live-fire demonstrations Q3 2025; integrated into U.S. Army proposals; commercial rollout targeted for 2026.

catalysts.event: Demonstrations planned for Vision-RF Imaging System Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: Demonstrations planned Q1 2026; disrupts surveillance markets; sub-meter precision geolocation.
Demonstrations Q4 2025; acquired integration from partner; production lines established; compatible with legacy turrets.
Prototypes field-tested; EI enables swarm coordination; initial deployments targeted for 2026.

catalysts.event: Israeli Ministry of Defense border security deployment for Q4 2025
catalysts.sentence: Advanced Israeli Ministry of Defense border security deployment for Q4 2025 and India Ministry of Defense 10-year agreement discussions, including APS trials and local manufacturing feasibility.

catalysts.event: Share Purchase Agreement with BladeRanger Ltd. to acquire Solar Drone Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On December 3, 2025, we entered into a Share Purchase Agreement (the Solar Agreement ) with BladeRanger Ltd., a company organized under the laws of Israel and listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange under the ticker BLRN ( Blade ), and, solely for purposes of acknowledgment and certain covenants therein, Solar Drone Ltd., an Israeli corporation ( Solar Drone ).
